trait.confidence_notes: GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit. eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.eqtl_lookup_note: eQTL follow-up completed for rsID-addressable loci; some loci lacked a usable rsID.
trait.category: Biological samples > Assay results > Blood assays > Blood count
trait.description_more: Result of "Platelet Count" assay, performed on blood sample, obtained from UK Biobank assessment centre visit. Platelet count is the number of thrombocytes derived from the platelet histogram.
